_comment: SANITIZED EXAMPLE claims bank — fictional, generic claims that show the structure only. Copy to profile/claims/claims-bank.json (gitignored) and replace with your own true, evidence-backed claims. Never fabricate. Only review_status=approved claims are usable in materials, and only for their allowed_lanes.

claims.claim_text: [EXAMPLE] Led a relational database migration with zero data loss across the full dataset.
claims.evidence: EXAMPLE — replace with your verifiable source (PR, runbook, employer).
claims.impact: Zero data-loss cutover (example metric — only keep if defensible).
claims.fabrication_risk: Only claim 'zero data loss' if validated by row counts/checksums; otherwise soften to 'validated integrity'.

claims.claim_text: [EXAMPLE] Built a third-party API integration powering a high-volume transactional system.
claims.evidence: EXAMPLE — replace with your verifiable source.
claims.fabrication_risk: Do not attach a revenue figure unless you can source it; impact left null on purpose.

claims.claim_text: [EXAMPLE] Shipped an internal tool that uses an LLM to draft and route structured documents.
claims.evidence: EXAMPLE — replace with your verifiable source.
claims.fabrication_risk: Draft until evidence is attached and impact is verifiable. Not usable while review_status != approved.

claims.claim_text: [EXAMPLE] Reduced page interaction latency on a customer-facing workflow.
claims.evidence: EXAMPLE — replace with your verifiable source.
claims.impact: Faster interactions (attach a measured % only if you have it).
claims.fabrication_risk: Percentage improvements are the most-faked metric; keep generic unless instrumented.

claims.evidence: Rejected — was one of several engineers; 'single-handedly/entire' is an over-claim.
claims.fabrication_risk: Kept as a rejected exemplar so the same over-claim is not re-introduced.

never_claim.text: Years of experience with a technology you have not used in production.
never_claim.reason: Tenure inflation is easy to disprove in interviews and on background checks.

never_claim.text: Sole ownership of team or multi-person achievements.
never_claim.reason: Use 'contributed to' / 'one of N engineers'; sole-credit claims are dishonest and risky.

never_claim.text: Specific revenue/percentage impact without a verifiable source.
never_claim.reason: Unsourced metrics are fabrication; leave impact null instead.
